info.title: Admission and Enrollment API
info.description: Backend Module for the College ERP System

get.description:
Root endpoint for health check.
We will hit this in Postman (as requested instead of swagger) to verify the server is running.

post.description: Step 1: An applicant requests a brochure for a specific course.

Step 2: Applicant pays the required 200rs fee for the brochure.
This also updates the Brochure Status to 'Payment Done'.

Step 1 (Application): Applicant submits their entire application payload.
Status starts as 'draft' until documents are uploaded and finalized.

Step 3 (Application): Applicant finalizes the application.
Checks for mandatory documents before moving from 'draft' to 'submitted'.

get.description: Applicant can track the progress of their application through status logs.

schema.title: Response Get Application Status Tracking Api V1 Applications  Application Id  Status Get

get.description: Get a list of all submitted applications.

schema.title: Response Get All Applications Api V1 Admin Applications Get

get.description: Get detailed information about a specific application.

post.description: Step 5: Admin reviews application and approves/rejects/requests revision.
Admin verifies or rejects a specific document uploaded by the applicant.

Step 1 (Documents): Applicant uploads physical files like Aadhar or Marksheet.
Constraints: Max 1MB, Format: jpg, jpeg, png.
Step 2 (Documents): Admin verifies the uploaded document.

get.description: Allows the applicant to see all their uploaded documents before final submission.

schema.title: Response Get Uploaded Documents Api V1 Documents Application  Application Id  Get

post.description: Final Admission Fee handling! This must only happen if the application is highly vetted.
Final step! Converts an approved and paid application into a full Enrollment Record.
